subcodes.first_line: At this hour, the blessed Tree, which by the hand of divine favor hath been planted in the Most Exalted Paradise, hath uttered these words [3.5s]... ...My God, my God! Praise be unto Thee for having revealed Thy path amidst Thy servants,and for having called the people to the Orient of Thy Revelation
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین سدره مبارکه که در فردوس اعلی بید عنایت الهی غرس شده باینکلمه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for prosperity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
